query:
SELECT p.name AS project, p.priority, p.sector,
  c.name AS contact, c.title, c.company, c.email, c.contactTrustTier
FROM projects p
JOIN contacts c ON c.project = p.name
WHERE p.id IN (1380015, 1350010, 1380002, 1350030)
  AND c.contactTrustTier IN ('send_ready', 'named_unverified')
ORDER BY p.id, c.contactTrustTier DESC, c.name;
command:

  c.name AS contact, c.title, c.company, c.email, c.contactTrustTier
FROM projects p
JOIN contacts c ON c.project = p.name
WHERE p.id IN (1380015, 1350010, 1380002, 1350030)
  AND c.contactTrustTier IN ('send_ready', 'named_unverified')
ORDER BY p.id, c.contactTrustTier DESC, c.name;
